theme.designMd:
# Leadiva Flat Institutional — Coral palette

Flat Enterprise Clean UI. Warm coral brand, no skeuomorphism.

## Surfaces (warm neutrals)
- surface.base: #f7f4f2
- surface.raised: #ffffff
- surface.border: #e8e2de

## Accent (coral family)
- accent.DEFAULT: #e76f51
- accent.dark: #c45a40
- accent.soft: #fde8e2 (subtle selected/hover backgrounds)
- accent.muted: #f4c4b8

## Text
- text.primary: #1c1917
- text.secondary: #78716c

## Status (semantic, coral-harmonized)
- status.open: #e76f51
- status.evaluating: #d97706
- status.won: #2a9d8f
- status.lost: #dc2626
- status.expiring: #ea580c
- status.inactive: #a8a29e

## Rules
CTAs, links, active nav, focus rings use coral #e76f51 only.
No purple, no cold institutional blue.
Flat panels: white + 1px border. Shadows only on modals/dropdowns.
Dense tables, subtle zebra with #f7f4f2.
Radius 6-8px. WCAG AA contrast.
